flags.message: Tooling drift, not a case problem: the predict prompt tells predictors to anchor on the statpack's 'Segment base rate by salience band' table, but the committed metrics/statpack.md contains no such section; and fedcourts query returned zero rows for every topic tried (including single-word topics like 'tribe'), so no similar-prior retrieval was possible. Prediction anchors on the modern per-Term cert base rates plus the docket's call-for-response signal instead.
